title: `unbound_conf_path` Output — per-name `local-zone static` + `local-data` — Design
summary: Technical design for a new optional router-hosts server output that emits authoritative unbound local-zone/local-data directives per managed name.
notes: Path under /specs/ and content is implementation contract (config schema, generator signatures, output format, test plan). Has a Decisions section (ADR-like) but Status is Draft and it is a build spec, not a single locked architectural decision; resolved in favor of SPEC (SPEC > PRD).
